symbols: children among wild animals — safety in the Kingdom
description: Another version of Edward Hicks's Peaceable Kingdom showing lions, leopards, oxen, and other animals coexisting peacefully with children in a pastoral setting. The naive folk-art style features flat forms and warm colors.
theological_description: Isaiah's vision: 'The wolf shall dwell with the lamb, and the leopard shall lie down with the young goat' (ISA.11.6). This prophesies the restoration of Eden's harmony under the Messiah, the 'shoot from the stump of Jesse' (ISA.11.1). Paul anticipates: 'The creation itself will be set free from its bondage to corruption' (ROM.8.21).
